top_signals.title: China's Central Bank Hints at New Policy Framework | The China Show 6/17/2026
top_signals.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Green Economy Tops $10 Trillion as Revenue Growth Accelerates
top_signals.summary: The green economy — the business lines of global listed companies that generate revenue from climate solutions — now boasts a record high market value of $10 trillion.

top_signals.title: Australia must be ‘monocultural,’ One Nation’s Hanson Says
top_signals.summary: Australian Sen. Pauline Hanson has said the shortage of housing and rising property prices and rents in the country are due to the increasing number of migrants.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kodak confirms data breach claimed by ShinyHunters extortion gang
top_signals.summary: Kodak has confirmed that it's working with external cybersecurity experts to investigate a security breach after hackers gained access to some of the company's data. [...]

top_signals.title: Senate, House reach agreement on housing bill banning CBDC through 2030
top_signals.summary: US Senate and House leaders have jointly released an updated version of a housing legislation that includes a CBDC ban.
